recipe.solutionCode:
from pathlib import Path
import base64
import runpy

_FILES = {
    'main.py': 'ZnJvbSBtb2RlbHMubWV0cmljX2l0ZW0gaW1wb3J0IE1ldHJpY0l0ZW0KCml0ZW0gPSBNZXRyaWNJdGVtKCJPcGVuIHRhc2tzIiwgNCkKcHJpbnQoaXRlbS5yZW5kZXIoKSkK',
    'models/report_item.py': 'Y2xhc3MgUmVwb3J0SXRlbToKICAgIGRlZiByZW5kZXIoc2VsZik6CiAgICAgICAgcmFpc2UgTm90SW1wbGVtZW50ZWRFcnJvcigiU3ViY2xhc3NlcyBtdXN0IGltcGxlbWVudCByZW5kZXIiKQo=',
    'models/metric_item.py': '',
    'models/__init__.py': '',
}

for _path, _data in _FILES.items():
    _file = Path(_path)
    _file.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _file.write_text(base64.b64decode(_data).decode('utf-8'), encoding='utf-8')

runpy.run_path('main.py', run_name="__main__")
